pace.caveat: not fuel-corrected; tyre-management can mask true pace
pace.headline: ANT 0.03s/lap faster on like compounds

start.caveat: lap-1 swing within normal first-lap scatter
start.headline: ANT -1 places on lap 1

tyre.caveat: fuel burn partially offsets degradation; small stint counts
tyre.headline: ANT tyres degrade 0.007s/lap less on like compounds

where.caveat: based on 28 vs 26 unique comparable laps — significance is exploratory at this sample size

attribution.narrative: Sector 13 (4484-4687 m): 0.157 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT carries ~5 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 1 (0-395 m): 0.120 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. NOR brakes ~118 m later than ANT (entry); ANT carries ~4 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 11 (3736-4223 m): 0.105 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. NOR brakes ~6 m later than ANT (entry); NOR gets to full throttle ~4 m sooner (exit).

where.headline: ANT gained in 11 of 14 micro-sectors
